# Remodeling Contractors SC

> Professional remodeling contractor serving Upstate South Carolina with 35+ years of experience. Specializes in custom garages, room additions, ADUs, decks, screened porches, kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, and basement finishing. SC licensed general contractor with transparent pricing and code-compliant construction.

## Contact

- Email: estimates@remodelingcontractorsc.com
- Phone: +1-864-724-4600
- Website: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com

## Service Area

Upstate South Carolina including Mauldin, Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, Gray Court, Laurens, Woodruff, Clinton, Greenwood, and surrounding areas in Greenville, Laurens, and Greenwood counties.

## Core Services

- Garages: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/garages
- Room Additions: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/room-additions
- ADUs (Accessory Dwelling Units): https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/adu
- Decks: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/decks
- Screened Porches: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/screened-porches
- Kitchen Remodeling: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/kitchen-remodeling
- Bathroom Remodeling: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/bathroom-remodeling
- Basement Finishing: https://remodelingcontractorsc.com/basement-finishing
